title: Naive Bayes Explained: From Avocados to Spam Filters
description: Understand Naive Bayes intuitively using avocados and spam filtering.
author: Ujjwal Singh

title: Matplotlib for Machine Learning: A Complete Beginner's Guide
description: If you are starting your machine learning journey, you will hear one thing again and again: data alone does not tell a story. You have to see it to understand it. That is exactly why Matplotlib exists.
author: Ujjwal Singh

title: Linear Algebra for Machine Learning, Part 1: Vectors, Norms and the Foundations of Matrix Calculus
description: This is the first part in a linear algebra series covering vectors, norms, and the foundations of matrix calculus for ML.
author: Ujjwal Singh

title: NumPy for Machine Learning: A Complete Beginner's Guide
description: Before you can do anything in machine learning, whether that is loading a dataset, running matrix calculus, or feeding numbers into a model, you need a way to store and manipulate large collections of numbers efficiently.
author: Ujjwal Singh

title: Python Recall: The Concepts You Always Forget
description: This is not a complete Python course. It deliberately skips the basics you already know and skips OOP entirely, since that deserves its own separate note.
author: Ujjwal Singh
